title: Intro
intro: Three rounds on the basics, and clean beats hard every time. Every hand comes straight back to your chin — nothing else matters if you're open.

rounds.opener: Long and straight, and everything comes back to your chin.
Turn the hip and let the shoulder follow — don't arm it.
Move your head first, then punch. Never one without the other.

title: Power day
intro: Six rounds, building to power. It comes from your legs turning, not your arms, so don't swing early.

rounds.opener: Find the distance before you commit to anything.
Sit down on it. Your legs throw this punch, not your arm.
Bend your knees to get there, don't bend your back.
Short and up, from underneath. Don't wind it up.
Keep breathing through the long ones — out on every punch.
Whatever's left, it goes here. Nothing saved.
